Elements.Name: IncludeDir0
Description: Choose Boost Aura Style.
选择冲刺特效.
Do you like the Werehog's Spiral Dash effect at night?
Now you can replace the Werehog's Spiral Dash with the Boost Aura that Sonic uses during the day.
你喜欢狼刺猬索尼克的螺旋冲刺特效么？
现在你可以将它替换为白天索尼克使用的冲刺特效了.
Imitates the flame-wreathed Boost Aura from Secret Rings,
with a slightly flashy visual effect.
模仿在Secret Rings中火焰缠绕的冲刺特效，
画面变得有些浮夸.
It mimics the Boost Aura from Sonic Colors.
However, due to technical limitations, the visual effect isn't a perfect replica,
but a version that gets close.
模仿索尼克色彩的冲刺特效.
不过由于技术力有限，没有很好的完全还原，
总之还是做出了差不多的版本.
It mimics the Boost Aura from Sonic Forces.
It's a highly saturated, constantly flickering, and a bit harsh-looking aura that,
for some reason, looks very cartoony in HE1.
模仿索尼克力量的冲刺特效，
高饱和闪烁得有点刺眼的特效，
不知为何在HE1里看起来很卡通.
It mimics the Boost Aura from Sonic Unleashed Wii/PS2.
Although it's not as polished as the Boost Aura in newer console versions,
I appreciate its transparency and flickering effects.
模仿Wii/PS2版的索尼克释放的冲刺特效，
虽然没有主机版那么精致，但我喜欢它的透明和闪烁效果.
It mimics the Boost Aura from Sonic Unleashed Trailer.
Sonic Team's original design for the Boost Aura was different from the final version
I tried to replicate its appearance to achieve a similar result.
模仿早期索尼克释放预告片里的冲刺特效，
SonicTeam最初设计的冲刺特效和最终版不同，我尝试模仿出那个预告片里的效果.
Added a faint trailing effect to the original Boost Aura to make it look less stiff.
给原版冲刺特效加一条淡淡的拖尾，让它看起来没那么生硬.
It imitates the vapor cone created when breaking the sound barrier in real life.
particularly attractive, but it gives you an idea of what Sonic's Boost Aura might look like in the real world.
模仿现实中真实的突破音障时产生的音障云，
它看起来不华丽甚至不能说是好看，但可以用它想象一下索尼克如果在真实世界中Boost会是怎么样的效果.
Hide the Boost Aura,
but leave a blue trail.
It looks very clean.
隐藏冲刺特效但留一条蓝色拖尾，看起来很干净.
Hide Boost Aura effects.
隐藏冲刺特效.
